content.full_text:
FAX 213-258-3398          BECERRA CAMPAIGN          P02

State Capitol
P.O. Box 942849
Sacramento, CA 94249-0001
(916) 445-0854

DISTRICT OFFICE
112 S. Taylor Avenue
Oroville, CA 95965
(213) 721-2904
FAX: (213) 721-4210

COMMITTEES:
Environmental Safety
and Toxic Materials
Human Services
Local Government
Revenue and Taxation

Assembly
California Legislature

October 22, 1992

Ms. Mary Ann Kvasager
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 600
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Ms. Kvasager:

When I spoke to you earlier this morning about filing
requirements, you indicated that our committee did not have to
file the October 22, 1992 report due to the following
circumstances: the candidate, Xavier Becerra, is currently
running for U.S. Congress and there has been no "activity",
i.e. contributions and/or expenditures, in his Assembly
campaign account that would support or oppose his position.

I also explained to you that Xavier Becerra made a
contribution (from personal funds) to a Congressman who is
seeking re-election. You indicated that this contribution
would not require our committee to file the October 22, 1992
report.

I am sure that I am not the first person who expressed how
complicated the campaign laws can be. I want to thank you for
your assistance and especially, for your patience.

Sincerely,

Jean Boyd
Friends of Xavier Becerra

Not printed, prepared or mailed at taxpayers expense
Printed on Recycled Paper
